calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-11-2002 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-11-2002 Text Ruling

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-12-2002 Overruled
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brenda Cruz Keith, Esq., 415-626-6494, appeared on behalf of plaintiff Webb Corporation.

There being no appearances in opposition, the Court adopted its tentative ruling as its order: Defendant DAVID NAVELSKI's demurrer is overruled with 5 days leave to answer. Order signed in open court. (AJR) Patrick Heard CSR#11055
